items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the exploratory step.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the scenario behavior for overriding availability for VIPs, but there is no concrete evidence provided that demonstrates this functionality. The linked use case outlines various needs and scenarios, yet none of the prior steps have confirmed the implementation of the necessary features, such as ticket number generation or multi-counter support. Without this foundational evidence, it is impossible to determine if the expected outcome can be achieved, leading to an inconclusive verdict.
